Table summary. File name: source-materials/existing-job-descriptions/accountability-frameworks/4_Treasurer Evaluation & Accountability Framework.docx. Type of document: Accountability framework. Purpose: Source for Treasurer accountability and review expectations.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee, Treasurer. Handbook: Maybe. Open questions: Is this approved, draft, or superseded?. File name: source-materials/existing-job-descriptions/final-approved/KBC_Church_Clerk_Job_Description_Rev_Nov2025.pdf. Type of document: Final approved job description. Purpose: Source for current Church Clerk role.. Current status: Imported final approved source. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Church Clerk. Handbook: No. Open questions: Does Clerk role affect financial records or business meeting reporting?.
